description: Overview dashboard for live state, observed network state, and live-video usage. Most panels query published api_* read models; the experimental prompt panel reads normalized live-video status directly to trial prompt visibility.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value
FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state
WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 120 SECOND
AND stream_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), ifNull(orch_address, '')))

SELECT toFloat64(ifNull(avg(s.output_fps), 0)) AS value
FROM naap.canonical_status_samples_recent_store AS s
INNER JOIN (
        SELECT event_id, argMax(refreshed_at, refreshed_at) AS max_ra
        FROM naap.canonical_status_samples_recent_store
        WHERE sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
        GROUP BY event_id
    ) AS _d ON s.event_id = _d.event_id AND s.refreshed_at = _d.max_ra
WHERE s.sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
AND s.is_attributed = 1 AND s.orch_address != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), s.org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), s.orch_address))

SELECT toFloat64(ifNull(avgIf(s.e2e_latency_ms, s.e2e_latency_ms > 0), 0)) / 1000.0 AS value
FROM naap.canonical_status_samples_recent_store AS s
INNER JOIN (
        SELECT event_id, argMax(refreshed_at, refreshed_at) AS max_ra
        FROM naap.canonical_status_samples_recent_store
        WHERE sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
        GROUP BY event_id
    ) AS _d ON s.event_id = _d.event_id AND s.refreshed_at = _d.max_ra
WHERE s.sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
AND s.is_attributed = 1
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), s.org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), s.orch_address))

SELECT toFloat64(sum(startup_success_sessions)) AS value
FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand
WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
AND pipeline_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))

SELECT toFloat64(uniqExact(gpu_id)) AS value
FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
AND hardware_present = 1
AND gpu_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))

SELECT toFloat64(uniqExact(orch_address)) AS value
FROM naap.canonical_status_hours
WHERE hour >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND orch_address IS NOT NULL AND orch_address != ''
  AND is_terminal_tail_artifact = 0
  AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
  AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
  AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))

WITH current_window AS (
    SELECT sum(requested_sessions) AS current_value
    FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand
    WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
      AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video'
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
), baseline_window AS (
    SELECT sum(requested_sessions) AS baseline_value
    FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand
    WHERE window_start >= now() - INTERVAL 8 DAY
      AND window_start < now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND pipeline_id = 'live-video-to-video'
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
)
SELECT if(
    ifNull(baseline_value, 0) = 0,
    0.0,
    (toFloat64(ifNull(current_value, 0)) - toFloat64(baseline_value)) / toFloat64(baseline_value)
) AS value
FROM current_window
CROSS JOIN baseline_window

panels.title: Demand Change (7d)
panels.description: Change in live-video requested sessions for the latest 24 hours versus the same 24-hour window seven days earlier.

targets.rawSql:
WITH current_window AS (
    SELECT uniqExact(gpu_id) AS current_value
    FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
    WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
      AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video'
      AND capability_family = 'builtin'
      AND hardware_present = 1
      AND gpu_id != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
), baseline_window AS (
    SELECT uniqExact(gpu_id) AS baseline_value
    FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer
    WHERE last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 8 DAY
      AND last_seen < now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
      AND canonical_pipeline = 'live-video-to-video'
      AND capability_family = 'builtin'
      AND hardware_present = 1
      AND gpu_id != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), model_id))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
)
SELECT if(
    ifNull(baseline_value, 0) = 0,
    0.0,
    (toFloat64(ifNull(current_value, 0)) - toFloat64(baseline_value)) / toFloat64(baseline_value)
) AS value
FROM current_window
CROSS JOIN baseline_window

panels.title: Observed Supply Change (7d)
panels.description: Change in observed live-video GPU supply for the latest 24 hours versus the same 24-hour window seven days earlier.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfInterval(window_start, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS time,
    sum(startup_success_sessions) AS served_sessions,
    sum(no_orch_sessions) AS unserved_sessions
FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand
WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start)
AND pipeline_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT if(gateway = '', 'unattributed_gateway', gateway) AS "Gateway",
    sum(requested_sessions) AS "Requested Sessions",
    sum(no_orch_sessions) AS "No Orch Sessions",
    sum(total_swapped_sessions) AS "Swapped Sessions",
    sum(startup_failed_sessions) AS "Startup Failed Sessions",
    if(sum(requested_sessions) > 0,
        toFloat64(sum(effective_failed_sessions)) / toFloat64(sum(requested_sessions)), 0.0) AS "Unmet Demand Rate"
FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand
WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start)
AND pipeline_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
GROUP BY if(gateway = '', 'unattributed_gateway', gateway)
ORDER BY sum(effective_failed_sessions) DESC, sum(requested_sessions) DESC

SELECT ifNull(nullIf(pipeline_id, ''), 'unknown_pipeline') AS "Pipeline",
    ifNull(nullIf(gateway, ''), 'unattributed_gateway') AS "Gateway",
    sum(effective_failed_sessions) AS "Unserved Sessions",
    sum(no_orch_sessions) AS "No Orch Sessions",
    sum(requested_sessions) AS "Requested Sessions",
    if(sum(requested_sessions) > 0,
        toFloat64(sum(effective_failed_sessions)) / toFloat64(sum(requested_sessions)), 0.0) AS "Unmet Demand Rate"
FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand
WHERE $__timeFilter(window_start)
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
GROUP BY ifNull(nullIf(pipeline_id, ''), 'unknown_pipeline'), ifNull(nullIf(gateway, ''), 'unattributed_gateway')
HAVING sum(effective_failed_sessions) > 0
ORDER BY sum(effective_failed_sessions) DESC, sum(requested_sessions) DESC
LIMIT 12

WITH status_prompts AS (
    SELECT canonical_session_key,
        gateway,
        event_ts,
        raw_pipeline_hint,
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(data, 'inference_status', 'last_params', 'model_id'), '') AS model_id,
        nullIf(JSONExtractString(data, 'inference_status', 'last_params', 'prompt'), '') AS prompt_text,
        JSONExtractRaw(data, 'inference_status', 'last_params', 'prompt') AS prompt_raw
    FROM naap.normalized_ai_stream_status
    WHERE $__timeFilter(event_ts)
      AND canonical_session_key != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
), ranked AS (
    SELECT canonical_session_key,
        gateway,
        event_ts,
        prompt_text,
        prompt_raw,
        row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY canonical_session_key ORDER BY event_ts DESC) AS rn
    FROM status_prompts
    WHERE (
            lower(raw_pipeline_hint) LIKE '%streamdiffusion%'
         OR lower(raw_pipeline_hint) LIKE '%comfyui%'
         OR lower(raw_pipeline_hint) LIKE '%live-video%'
      )
      AND (
            '${model:csv}' = '__all'
         OR '${model:csv}' = ''
         OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, ''))
         OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(raw_pipeline_hint, ''))
      )
      AND (
            prompt_text != ''
         OR (prompt_raw NOT IN ('', 'null', '{}', '[]'))
      )
), latest AS (
    SELECT event_ts,
        gateway,
        if(
            prompt_text != '',
            left(replaceRegexpAll(trim(BOTH ' ' FROM prompt_text), '\s+', ' '), 120),
            concat('[structured] ', substring(lower(hex(MD5(prompt_raw))), 1, 12))
        ) AS prompt_label
    FROM ranked
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT prompt_label AS "Prompt",
    count() AS "Sessions",
    countDistinct(gateway) AS "Gateways",
    max(event_ts) AS "Latest Seen"
FROM latest
GROUP BY prompt_label
ORDER BY "Sessions" DESC, "Latest Seen" DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Top Live Video Prompts (selected range)
panels.description: Latest prompt seen per live-video session in the selected range. This panel reads normalized live-video status directly, matches the dashboard model filter against both live-video pipeline hints and embedded model ids, and groups structured prompts by hash when they are not plain strings.

targets.rawSql:
WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label, org
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
eligible_orch AS (
    SELECT orch_address
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
    WHERE orch_address != ''
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
),
windowed_sla AS (
    SELECT s.orchestrator_address,
        s.window_start,
        s.requested_sessions,
        s.pipeline_id,
        ifNull(s.model_id, '') AS model_id_key,
        ifNull(s.gpu_id, '') AS gpu_id_key,
        s.sla_score
    FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla s
    INNER JOIN eligible_orch eo ON eo.orch_address = s.orchestrator_address
    WHERE $__timeFilter(s.window_start)
      AND s.orchestrator_address != ''
      AND s.sla_score IS NOT NULL
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT orchestrator_address,
        argMax(sla_score, tuple(window_start, requested_sessions, pipeline_id, model_id_key, gpu_id_key)) AS latest_sla_score
    FROM windowed_sla
    GROUP BY orchestrator_address
)
SELECT ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(ranked.orchestrator_address, 8), '...', right(ranked.orchestrator_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    toFloat64(round(assumeNotNull(ranked.latest_sla_score), 2)) AS "SLA Score"
FROM ranked
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = ranked.orchestrator_address
ORDER BY "SLA Score" DESC, "Orchestrator" ASC
LIMIT 20

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
agg AS (
    SELECT orch_address,
        countDistinct(canonical_session_key) AS active_streams,
        sum(avg_output_fps * status_samples) / nullIf(sum(status_samples), 0) AS avg_fps,
        ifNull(sum(avg_e2e_latency_ms * status_samples) / nullIf(sum(status_samples), 0), 0) / 1000.0 AS avg_e2e_latency_s,
        arrayStringConcat(arraySort(groupUniqArray(ifNull(nullIf(canonical_model, ''), 'unknown'))), ', ') AS model_ids
    FROM naap.canonical_status_hours
    WHERE $__timeFilter(hour)
      AND orch_address IS NOT NULL AND orch_address != ''
      AND is_terminal_tail_artifact = 0
      AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(canonical_model, '')))
      AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))
    GROUP BY orch_address
),
orch_latest_sla AS (
    SELECT s.orchestrator_address,
        argMax(s.sla_score, tuple(s.window_start, s.requested_sessions, ifNull(s.pipeline_id, ''), ifNull(s.model_id, ''), ifNull(s.gpu_id, ''))) AS latest_sla_score
    FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_sla s
    INNER JOIN agg a ON a.orch_address = s.orchestrator_address
    WHERE $__timeFilter(s.window_start)
      AND s.orchestrator_address != ''
      AND s.sla_score IS NOT NULL
      AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
    GROUP BY s.orchestrator_address
),
orch_sla_rank AS (
    SELECT orchestrator_address,
        latest_sla_score,
        row_number() OVER (ORDER BY latest_sla_score DESC, orchestrator_address ASC) AS sla_rank
    FROM orch_latest_sla
)
SELECT orch_sla_rank.sla_rank AS "SLA Rank",
    ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(a.orch_address, 8), '...', right(a.orch_address, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    a.model_ids AS "Models Seen In Range",
    a.active_streams AS "Active Streams",
    round(a.avg_fps, 2) AS "Avg FPS",
    round(a.avg_e2e_latency_s, 3) AS "Avg E2E Latency (s)",
    round(orch_sla_rank.latest_sla_score, 2) AS "SLA Score"
FROM agg a
LEFT JOIN orch_sla_rank ON orch_sla_rank.orchestrator_address = a.orch_address
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = a.orch_address
ORDER BY isNull(orch_sla_rank.latest_sla_score) ASC, orch_sla_rank.latest_sla_score DESC, a.active_streams DESC, a.avg_fps DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top Orchestrators (Aggregated Across Models In Selected Range)
panels.description: One row per orchestrator address. SLA rank is the latest orchestrator-level score in range; the model column is a distinct list of models seen for that orchestrator during the selected range, not a per-model SLA row.

targets.rawSql:
WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
),
active_paths AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, gateway,
        ifNull(nullIf(pipeline, ''), 'unknown') AS pipeline,
        countDistinct(stream_id) AS active_streams,
        round(avg(output_fps), 2) AS avg_fps
    FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state
    WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
    AND stream_id != ''
    AND attribution_status = 'resolved'
    AND orch_address IS NOT NULL AND orch_address != ''
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(model_id, '')))
    GROUP BY addr, gateway, pipeline
)
SELECT ifNull(gateway, 'unknown') AS "From",
    ifNull(labels.orch_label, concat(left(a.addr, 8), '...', right(a.addr, 4))) AS "Orchestrator",
    a.addr AS "Orchestrator Address",
    a.pipeline AS "Pipeline",
    toUInt64(a.active_streams) AS "Active Streams (15m)",
    toFloat64(a.avg_fps) AS "Avg FPS"
FROM active_paths a
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = a.addr
WHERE ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), a.addr))
ORDER BY "Active Streams (15m)" DESC, "Avg FPS" DESC
LIMIT 50

WITH labels AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, orch_label
    FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity
)
SELECT s.stream_id AS "Stream ID",
    s.orch_address AS "Orchestrator Address",
    if(ifNull(labels.orch_label, '') != '', labels.orch_label, ifNull(nullIf(s.orch_address, ''), 'unresolved')) AS "Orchestrator",
    ifNull(s.pipeline, 'unknown') AS "Pipeline",
    s.attribution_status AS "Attribution Status",
    round(ifNull(s.output_fps, 0), 2) AS "FPS",
    s.state AS "State",
    toUInt64(greatest(dateDiff('second', s.sample_ts, now()), 0)) AS "Last Sample Age (s)"
FROM naap.api_current_active_stream_state s
LEFT JOIN labels ON labels.addr = s.orch_address
WHERE s.last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 120 SECOND
AND s.stream_id != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), s.org))
AND ('${model:csv}' = '__all' OR '${model:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${model:csv}'), ifNull(s.model_id, '')))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), s.orch_address))
ORDER BY "Last Sample Age (s)" ASC, "FPS" DESC
LIMIT 20

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM (SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.canonical_status_samples_recent_store WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.canonical_active_stream_state_latest_store WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT ifNull(org, '') AS org FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL WHERE ifNull(org, '') != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.resolver_dirty_windows FINAL WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity WHERE org != '') AS orgs WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM (SELECT org FROM naap.api_hourly_streaming_demand WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.canonical_status_samples_recent_store WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.canonical_active_stream_state_latest_store WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT ifNull(org, '') AS org FROM naap.resolver_dirty_partitions FINAL WHERE ifNull(org, '') != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.resolver_dirty_windows FINAL WHERE org != '' UNION ALL SELECT org FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity WHERE org != '') AS orgs WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE model_id != '' AND hardware_present = 1 AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address)) ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.api_observed_capability_offer WHERE model_id != '' AND hardware_present = 1 AND last_seen >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address)) ORDER BY model_id

list.definition: SELECT orch_address AS __value, orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) ORDER BY __text
list.label: Orchestrator (ENS)
list.name: orchestrator
list.query: SELECT orch_address AS __value, orch_label AS __text FROM naap.api_orchestrator_identity WHERE ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org)) ORDER BY __text

title: NaaP: Live AI Video
